field_changes.current: Embedded an unsourced cause ('consistent with an unpaid public-transport fine') and a materiality judgment inside a primary-verified observation; the filed documents state creditor and amount, never the debt's origin. Also, the insolvency-register part could never be asserted: ISIR was BLOCKED (HTTP 500), not searched. Split 2026-07-18.
